name: RAG Navigator
description: Index local Markdown, text, and Web Ingest JSONL corpora; retrieve relevant passages; inspect neighboring chunks; and build citation-ready, token-conscious context packs without an external API.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Check engine readiness, dependencies, storage path, and retrieval mode.

tools.name: inventory_corpus
tools.description: Inspect a local corpus before indexing. Reports supported files, size, and extension breakdown without reading content into model context.

corpus.description: Directory containing Markdown, text, or chunks.jsonl files.

max_file_bytes.description: Skip files larger than this many bytes. Default 5000000.

tools.name: index_corpus
tools.description: Create a deterministic local retrieval index. Understands Web Ingest chunks.jsonl natively and chunks ordinary Markdown/text by paragraph and heading.

index.description: Optional index JSON path. Defaults under ~/.switchbay/rag-navigator/indexes.

chunk_chars.description: Target chunk size for ordinary text files. Default 3200.

overlap_chars.description: Chunk overlap for ordinary text files. Default 240.

max_file_bytes.description: Maximum bytes per input file. Default 5000000.

tools.name: corpus_status
tools.description: List index metadata and compact source catalog so the model can understand what knowledge is available.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Rank passages using local BM25-style lexical retrieval plus exact phrase, title, and heading boosts. Returns stable chunk IDs and source metadata.

query.description: Focused retrieval query using concrete domain terms.

source_filter.description: Optional case-insensitive substring filter for source paths.

include_text.description: Include full chunk text. Set false for a compact result map.

tools.name: read_chunk
tools.description: Read a known chunk by stable ID and optionally include nearby chunks from the same source for continuity.

chunk_id.description: Stable chunk ID returned by search, such as c000014.

neighbor_window.description: Adjacent chunks on each side. Default 0, max 5.

tools.name: build_context
tools.description: Retrieve, expand neighboring passages, deduplicate, and assemble a citation-ready evidence pack under a hard character budget for an LLM or SLM prompt.

query.description: Question or evidence need to retrieve for.

top_k.description: Seed results before neighbor expansion. Default 8.

neighbor_window.description: Adjacent chunks per seed. Default 1, max 3.

max_chars.description: Hard context budget in characters. Default 12000.
